programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan
programme.desc: A single woman comes across the man of her dreams on the very same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Devastated by his wife's request for a divorce, middle-aged Cal ventures out to meet women according to his new friend's advice.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart gives up being an FBI field agent to become the public face of the bureau. However, when two of her friends get kidnapped in Las Vegas, she sets out to rescue them, defying direct orders.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: Duke reads the story of Allie and Noah, two lovers who were separated by fate, to Ms Hamilton, an old woman who suffers from dementia, on a daily basis out of his notebook.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: Sophie, an aspiring writer assisted by the secretaries of Juliet, sets out to unite Claire with her long-lost love. While on her journey, she finds herself drawn to Claire's grandson.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6 - EP 42
programme.desc: All of Ollipolis is on the hunt for the famed, elusive Abominable Snowman. When Rover goes missing, they suspect the monster may have taken him. The Shifty Squares go on an online shopping spree and buy too much stuff, causing a huge delivery pile-up.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get their Dad (as Daddy Robot) to do it for them. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot begins to malfunction with some disastrous results.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1 - EP 5
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey, Coco and Snickers play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules (and not changing them) can make the game even more fun.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1 - EP 6
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with their Dad. But Bingo gets upset, when she discovers a walking leaf insect and for her Dad, he is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shelly has two problems, Sticky hasn't come back from finding more pearls for her necklace. Where could he be? The Number Squad are only too happy to help! Mauirce calls on Number Squad to help find the Captain who got sucked into a board game. But this game isn't for the fainthearted and Number Squad will need to use maths knowledge to free him.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures - EP 49
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Flat foot, arched foot - does it really matter? Why should I care about the shoes I wear? What is plantar fasciitis and how can we prevent it? Fatin Amira and Ahmad Yusof share their experiences dealing with feet pain.

programme.title: Calon Isteri Buat Suami - EP 9

programme.title: Bukan Puteri Lindungan Bulan - EP 12
programme.desc: After being caught at the hotel, Sabrina is offered a settlement by Lara. Zafir feels unsettled by what Sabrina tells him.

programme.title: Siapa Terror?! - EP 2
programme.desc: This is the story about two sisters, Hamimah and Halina who lead very materialistic lives. They are always 'competing' against each other to see who has better 'placing' in life and status. They also tend to disregard their husband's say or advice. Hamimah practically bullies the husband (Azhar) with emotional blackmail and harsh words. Halina treats her husband (Sham) like a remote control. Their

programme.title: En Bloc - EP 7
programme.desc: En Bloc takes a look into the lives of residents of HUDC apartments. Riveting stories of jealousy, revenge, suspicion and misunderstanding lurk behind closed doors and threaten to spill as well as implicate other neighbours. This adds on to the frenzy when the residents hear news that a committee was set up to put their homes up for en bloc sale.

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 25
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 8
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: One On One - EP 4
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will reveal stories that have never been shared with celebrities in the country.

programme.title: Mawar Dahlia - EP 11

The driver makes a detour and starts to reveal shocking secrets hidden deep in Pete's tormented past. The second story is 'Reborn', about Tiwa, a girl with the power to communicate with the dead. When she tries to help the owner of a huanted hotel to set captive spirits free, she finds out the truth about a grues

programme.title: Pontianak Sesat Dalam Kampung
programme.desc: On a mission to find the naughtiest person's blood to save King Ponti, Ros Kembang wanders into a village. Starring Kamal Adli and Emma Maembong.

programme.title: Misterius
programme.desc: Lestari's husband died three years ago, and she has been running a garment business on her own. She has two grown children, Agus and Wulan. After one of her employees, Sumiyati, dies, Lestari and her children begin to experience visitations by Sumiyati's restless spirit. The terrifying supernatural experiences leave Lestari no choice but to enlist the help of a shaman. It seems that Sumiyati has s

programme.title: Project Gemini
programme.desc: Through an international project known as Gemini, a planet terraforming unit is formed. But the unit loses connection with Earth and floats out of the solar system. Years after the unit is considered lost, a group of astrophysicists receive a mysterious signal from outer space. A small group is sent off into the great and unkown abyss to locate the source of the signal and save the Earth from dest

programme.title: Orang Minyak Kampung Lenggong
programme.desc: Amir makes a pact with a supernatural village elder for wealth, but breaking the no-bribe rule ruins him. To reclaim riches, he becomes the feared Orang Minyak, hunting corrupt men in Lenggong village.

programme.title: Haunted Universities 2nd Semester
programme.desc: Every campus has its own horror tales. There's an endless supply of ghost stories passed down from class to class, and three of the scariest tales will be told this time: The 'C' Bed, The Final Year's Cheer and The Old Science Building.

programme.title: Ghost Hospital
programme.desc: Seorang doktor baru memulakan tugas di sebuah hospital dipercayai berhantu di mana dia bertemu dengan jururawat cantik dan mereka membongkar rahsia yang terdapat di hospital tersebut.

programme.title: Hantu Bukit Cina
programme.desc: 3 teenagers Jo, Luna and Sandra have missed their bus that was supposed to take them to their cultural dance course. In order to make it to their destination, the trio hitch a ride with Kent and Zack who are on their way to go fishing. As the group takes off on their journey, their ride suddenly breaks down in a creepy desolate area. It's not long after when mysterious happenings start to unravel

programme.title: Moon Light
programme.desc: Thanathip lives in his ancestral home alone, keeping the house and any unexpected visitors safe. He wants to know why a particular ghost is haunting him. On the night of the waning moon, an uninvited guest accidentally provokes the ghost to become angry and she kills everyone. Because of this incident, Thanathip goes back in time to discover the truth behind the woman's death.

programme.title: The Shaman Pencabut Nyawa
programme.desc: Rian is young medical doctor doing post-graduate work, assigned to fill a position at a small clinic in a village near Sendawar, Kutai Barat. A series of weird things happen right after he arrives. Visions of a mysterious wounded girl, people with marks from strange surgeries, people disappearing mysteriously. All this is made worse by a traditional healer who rejects modern medicine. The myths ab

programme.title: Deep Fear
programme.desc: Paris, the Eighties.three students decide to celebrate their graduation with a visit of Paris catacombs. When they discover the legendary 717 Bunker, little do they know it's not the only thing Nazi soldiers have left behind them. Something, someone, is hunting them. Trapped deep underground, the group needs to get out before it's too late.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sains Tahun 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai magnet , kegunaannya dalam kehidupan kita dan menerangkan pelbagai bentuk magnet seperti magnet bar, silinder, bentuk U, ladam, butang dan cincin.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue of an unseasoned farmhand whose herd of Ostrich are on the loose. Then Billy and Tim save some house flippers from a red-alert rat infestation.

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey goes to the High Arctic for survival training with the Canadian Rangers, Joe goes to California, and the RCAF turns to Buffalo for plane repairs.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire and Mikey surprises Joe with a birthday gift: his first helicopter lesson.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Kangaroo Mob

programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers becom

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country's rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish

programme.title: Arya - EP 1
programme.desc: Arya, a disciplined and respected football coach is in a committed relationship with Mithra, a compassionate counsellor working with juvenile inmates. Their worlds intertwine as Arya struggles to keep his team in check, while Mithra navigates the challenges of guiding troubled youths toward a better path.

programme.title: Arya - EP 2
programme.desc: Captain Surya gets into a fight at the party Arya warned him against and is injured. Arya benches him, sparking a confrontation with Surya's father, the team owner. Meanwhile, Mithra learns that the juvenile team is looking for a new coach - one with a negative history with Arya. Stripped of his title, and burning with resentment, is Arya about to lose everything to the one man he despises most?

programme.title: Ayalaan - EP 31
programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. programme.title: Appu
programme.desc: Taxi driver Appu is haunted by his past when his sister was killed by a eunuch who was also a powerful pimp. While trying to find him, he comes across another girl who is about to meet the same fate.

programme.title: Devar Veettu Ponnu
programme.desc: Devar abandons Meenakshi in a bid to fulfill his dying father's wish. Devar's brother kills her and the child, Shankari. She comes as a ghost to seek her revenge with the help of her sister, Savithri.

programme.title: Mouna Geethangal
programme.desc: A woman realises she is pregnant after she divorces her husband for having an affair. Many years later, her husband enters her life, eager to reunite with her.

programme.title: Subramaniyapuram
programme.desc: Five fast friends live a carefree life in Madhurai in the '80s. However, their loyalty towards each other is tested when they commit an almost perfect crime but do not manage to get away with it.

programme.title: Raajiyam
programme.desc: Karthikeyan runs a secret agency. When he proves that the governor's son has killed his own wife, the leader hatches a plan to exact revenge.

programme.title: Time
programme.desc: Tulsi's father dies of heart attack after Srinivas's uncle rejects his daughter's marriage proposal. Dejected by the loss, Tulsi leaves her hometown without informing Srinivas.

programme.title: Kadhal Kisu Kisu
programme.desc: A schemed love story by Indhu's friends makes her fall in love with Sriram. However, her father strongly opposes their union and goes to great lengths to break their relationship.

programme.title: Kadhal Solla Vandhen

programme.title: Kaalai Thaeneer

programme.title: Sudhanthiram
programme.desc: Vishwa, a goon and an aspiring boxer, works for Sopraj, a gangster. When Sopraj brutally kills a social worker in front of Vishwa, he decides to turn approver against his boss.

programme.title: Chandramouli
programme.desc: Sivaji and his family are uprooted from their community in Sri Lanka and wind up as bonded labourers in Vishakhapatnam. Like his legendary namesake, he rises up to become the saviour of the oppressed.

programme.title: Cheran Pandian
programme.desc: Periya Gounder, who adheres to the caste system, ill-treats his stepbrother Chinna as his mother is from a lower caste. His life takes a turn when his daughter falls in love with Chinna's relative.

programme.title: Jodi
programme.desc: Kannan falls in love with Gayathri but both decide to win the hearts of each other's family members and marry with their consent.

programme.title: Laththi

programme.title: Classic Show

programme.title: Red Dawn

programme.title: I Am Wrath

programme.title: Piranha 3D

programme.title: Rambo III

programme.desc: Strong-willed Samrat and his sister Kishmish defy the cruel norms of their village. As atrocities against women rise, the siblings-in-action wage a rebellion.

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi Ep634
programme.desc: Mangal journeys to find an ideal husband for beloved Lakshmi. Despite obstacles, Mangal persists, revealing the power of sisterhood and predestined connections.

programme.title: Mahadev & Sons Ep37
programme.desc: Mahadev, a man of principle, runs a strict household as the head of his family. However, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues.

programme.title: Laughter Chefs S3 Ep50
programme.desc: Laughter Chefs S3 is a fun-filled cooking show where celebrity duos take on hilarious kitchen challenges. With Bharti Singh hosting and Chef Harpal judging, it's all about food, laughter, and chaos.

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki Ep353
programme.desc: Abandoned and gifted, Mannat becomes a chef, unaware her boss is her mother. Secrets and betrayal test her strength. Will she find her destiny?

programme.title: Meri Bhavya Life Ep354
programme.desc: Two polar opposites, a woman who embraces her overweight figure along with a man who is a fitness enthusiast, fall for each other but must navigate the differences in their lifestyles.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
programme.desc: This is Film - Thriller Category.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

programme.title: Bulan & Pria Terhebat
programme.desc: Bulan, seorang pelatih dalam pasukan khas Indonesia, memulai perjalanannya di sebuah sindiket pemerdagangan manusia untuk mencari saudara perempuannya yang diculik, Melati.

programme.title: The Jurassic Games

programme.title: Harry Boy
programme.desc: Pergolakan rumahtangga kedua-dua ibu bapanya telah menyebabkan Harry Boy, seorang pelajar kolej menjadi seorang remaja liar. Sikap liarnya mula berubah setelah mengenali Haryati.

programme.title: AstroBiz Mencari Kedai Lejen: Rezeky Tomyam
programme.desc: Mencari Kedai Lejen ialah siri dokumentari yang mengangkat kisah pemilik F&B tempatan. Dua restoran, dua menu berlainan, berkongsi satu legasi kisah Aunty T's serta Rezeky Tomyam, dedikasi dan pengorbanan.

programme.title: Aku, Mawar & Makhluk Asing

programme.title: Cinta Luar Biasa
